I've been playing this game for more than 5 years, I had over Million Coins and Gems, but I updated the app yesterday and all is gone. The 9000 Lvl again started from zero. What the hell? I am finally thinking about uninstalling this app. Really Disappointing.
Filled with ads and popups, a complete mess!

If i could give this a 0 star i would. To sum this whole game up you can describe this game in one word ADS. Theres more ads in this game than getting to play the game! Whilst your playing a level, theres an ad at the bottem, and some are inapropriate! Like one was a naked person! If you fail the level, (AD) if you complete the level, (AD) if your halfway through the level, (AD) whilst your playing the level, (AD), you get the point. You hardly ever get to actually play it! Horiffic game.

I thought this game would be so addicting but no. Why? Because here's my reasons why: 1. I didn't want to jump and it made me jump then I had to start the level all over again. 2. I did a double jump and it made me jump once, then I had to start the level over, so annoying.. 3. It's a very laggy game. 4. Too many advertisements

To be clear, I understand the need to monetize, but when your app keeps actively trying to get rid of me via clickable ads that guide me elsewhere, I don't start to think, "Gee, I should probably pay to get rid of those." Instead, I think, "Huh. This app really doesn't want me here. Guess I'll take the hint and uninstall." Fix your obnoxious ads, then maybe you'll have a half decent game.

Ad jump 3d. Could be a good game but plagued by ads after almost every level. Appreciate the devs need to make money but this is ridiuculous. I ended up constantly quitting and restarting the game as each ad linked to the play store and i couldn't find a way out. Possibly a fun game hiding in here but life is too short to actually find it. Uninstalled.

played less than 3 minutes, got 5 ads ,uninstalled after that, i dont mind ads but thiss is total bull when you have to ait through more ad time than play time. probably same scummy developers who do it on all their games ,(after the reply just want to add, your not doing the the best you can to minimise them, plenty of other games dont have by far that many)

I've seen apps with more constant ads, but this one still ranks high on the annoyance meter. The ad free does seem much better priced than most apps I've seen, but I'm also not going to give an app with a weekly 6 dollar "VIP" subscription (which, might I add, for one week is 3 times the price of the one-time ad free purchase) any gold stars.

First, have no idea why anyone could possibly say "I can't pass level ten!" Or something because I got to level 30 within thirty seconds. The games are so quick and so boring. You can't even buy 'skins' or whatever, even though for earning money! Because you can't even buy anything with it! LITERALLY NOTHING! Don't know about the ads because I played it off Internet- that might be the only plus. Would recommend this game for desperacy, but not to play constantly. Pretty boring. uninstalling.

Avoid. Nice casual puzzle game with great art and kinda neat concept but all ads. One third toddler level gameplay and two thirds ads and games in ads too. No way to justify keeping it or continuing to play past 10 minutes without some apk modification or adblock or premium paid version. I am sure it gets good and maybe a little challenging I hope later on and I bet it generates revenue well.

i gave 2 stars because i feel like this could be a very good game, but i can't even tell if i like the game or not because there are WAY too many ads, sometimes even stopping me in the middle of the level to watch. i completely understand that ads are necessary for games to remain free, but this is overly excessive! star_4.text: The game is great - it's so satisfying to flip the bottle around and the designs you can get are so cool. There aren't many problems with this game, but it's really easy to accidentally press one of the buttons at the bottom and when you do, it makes the game really laggy. Also, usually there were barely any ads but now ads appear every time you lose. But overall, the cencept of the game is cool and the graphics aren't that bad. So yeah just a bit of work and I will rate this game 5 stars.Thanks

I love how you included the Homer Simpson hedge meme! Lol very fun and addicting game. My only complaint is that sometimes it's difficult to tell what you can and can't land on, specifically when it comes to picture frames. I love how so many objects are interactive when landing on them! Doors opening, faucets running, microwaves turning on, stereos playing music, etc. Very cool idea! Also, thank you for allowing the player to advance to the next level after a few failed attempts!

It's an amazing game with cool backgrounds. There's a couple of problems, It asks you WAY too much if you want to purchase VIP,and WAYYY too many adds. Over all, great game. If you have kids, I would recommend being 8 or older. It's an AMAZING time killer. SOOOOO ADDICTING. But the challenges are NEVER really hard.If you're ALWAYS in a hurry,I don't recommend downloading this game cause once you start playing, your brain tells you that you CAN'T stop. But great game.Have fun!

Good game, but this has already been done by Tastypill, Pam Pam, and yabado. Although the original game is a classic and fun, this one introduces the mechanic of collecting coins and buying things, unlike the original where you are stuck with the default. Overall, it still makes for a good game and idea. It also adds a tutorial that is more effective and teaches new players mechanics, unlike the original. Good execution and great graphics.

It is a simple game so a little kid could play it. Tap on the object to make it jump, or tap again in mid air to jump again. You have to have a sense of timing & be able measure the arc of a falling object. I enjoyed it mostly because the dev made it with short ads. So there is very little down time between games. Try it. It surprised me, that I enjoyed it.
